statement: The dependency-scanning, SBOM, and provenance/attestation sub-components of agent-enterprise's safety layer are commodity capabilities already provided fail-closed in CI by OSV-Scanner, Socket, Semgrep, and SLSA/Sigstore.

evidence.quote: reusable GitHub workflows... fail builds above a severity threshold.
Static analysis flags new install scripts, obfuscated code, privileged API usage; Firewall proxy blocks malicious package downloads at install time.
SLSA build provenance is a signed document making claims about how an artifact was built; Sigstore provides keyless signing and Rekor transparency log.

falsifier: If these tools could not be wired to fail builds, the dep/provenance overlap would be weaker.
